base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of intro_stage — a tile from 1993 mega man x. Intro Stage — Highway opening. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Intro Stage — Highway opening; Vile encounter + Zero save. Signature MMX cinematic intro
